evals.prompt: Verify that telemetry is flowing from this Flask app. The service is at examples/python/flask-basic/
evals.expected_output: Observer collector started, service exercised, traces and metrics confirmed, inventory Verified column updated
expectations: The skill attempts to start or connect to the Observer collector
HTTP endpoints of the service are exercised (GET, POST, or similar requests)
Trace data is queried or checked from the collector
Metric data is queried or checked from the collector
inventory.md Verified column is updated to OK for confirmed signals

evals.prompt: Check if my instrumentation is actually working for the kvstore service at examples/go/kvstore/
evals.expected_output: Service started, KV operations exercised, telemetry validated against inventory
expectations: The skill attempts to build and run the Go service
KV store endpoints are exercised (PUT, GET, DELETE operations)
Trace or metric data is checked from the collector
A coverage summary is reported showing verified vs total signals
